
---
title: "Complete Soil Data Access (SDA) + SQL Training"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
code-link: true
filters: []
---

# Soil Data Access (SDA) + SQL Training

> **Purpose:** Complete, single-file SDA training document covering SQL fundamentals, SDA service usage, spatial/AOI workflows, SDMOnline vs SSURGO, and embedded SDA SQL Library examples.

---

## 1. Authoritative SDA Documentation

- SDA Query Help: https://sdmdataaccess.nrcs.usda.gov/QueryHelp.aspx
- SDA Query Guide (PDF): https://sdmdataaccess.nrcs.usda.gov/documents/SoilDataAccessQueryGuide.pdf
- Tables & Columns Report: https://sdmdataaccess.nrcs.usda.gov/documents/TablesAndColumnsReport.pdf
- Table Relationships Report: https://sdmdataaccess.nrcs.usda.gov/documents/TableRelationshipsReport.pdf
- Web Service Help (Tabular/post.rest): https://sdmdataaccess.nrcs.usda.gov/WebServiceHelp.aspx
- SSURGO Portal User Guide: https://www.nrcs.usda.gov/sites/default/files/2023-10/SSURGO%20Portal%20User%20Guide.pdf
- Soil Data Viewer 6.2 User Guide: https://www.nrcs.usda.gov/sites/default/files/2022-09/Soil-Data-Viewer-6-2-User-Guide.pdf

---

## 2. SDMOnline vs. SSURGO

### SSURGO
- Public authoritative dataset (tabular + spatial)
- Accessed via WSS, SDA, and SSURGO Portal

### SDMOnline
- Internal operational mirror used by DS Hub pipelines
- Includes views with prefixes/suffixes like: `sdmonline.<table>_vw`, `sdmonline.<table>_mv`
- Refreshed when `sacatalog` changes
- Used when backend services or spatial engines need real-time SSURGO-like content

**Bottom line:** Use **SSURGO** for authoritative public products; use **SDMOnline** for internal operational pipelines.

---

## 3. SDA Schema Reference (Join Path)

```text
legend (lkey)
  └── mapunit (mukey)
        ├── component (cokey)
        │     └── chorizon (chkey)
        └── muaggatt (mukey)
```

---

## 4. Calling SDA Tabular Services Over HTTP

### cURL
```bash
curl -X POST \
  "https://sdmdataaccess.sc.egov.usda.gov/Tabular/post?format=json+columnname" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" \
  --data-urlencode "query=SELECT TOP 5 mukey, musym, muname FROM mapunit"
```

### PowerShell
```powershell
$uri = "https://sdmdataaccess.sc.egov.usda.gov/Tabular/post?format=json+columnname"
$q   = "SELECT TOP 5 mukey, musym, muname FROM mapunit"
Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri $uri -Body @{ query = $q }
```

### Python
```python
import requests
uri = "https://sdmdataaccess.sc.egov.usda.gov/Tabular/post?format=json+columnname"
q = "SELECT TOP 5 mukey, musym, muname FROM mapunit"
resp = requests.post(uri, data={"query": q})
print(resp.json())
```

---

## 5. Immediate vs Queued Mode

- Immediate: ≈ 10k rows, ≈ 30 sec
- Queued: Larger datasets packaged asynchronously

Always scope queries using:
- `WHERE` filters
- `TOP/LIMIT`
- Chunked MUKEY/areasymbol lists

---

## 6. SDA Training SQL Examples

### Legend → Mapunit → Component
```sql
SELECT lg.areasymbol, lg.areaname,
       mu.mukey, mu.musym, mu.muname,
       c.cokey, c.compname, c.comppct_r, c.hydgrp
FROM legend AS lg
JOIN mapunit AS mu ON lg.lkey = mu.lkey
JOIN component AS c ON mu.mukey = c.mukey
WHERE lg.areasymbol LIKE 'CO%'
ORDER BY mu.mukey, c.comppct_r DESC;
```

### Hydrologic Soil Group (% of MUKEY)
```sql
WITH comp AS (
  SELECT mu.mukey, c.hydgrp, c.comppct_r
  FROM legend lg
  JOIN mapunit mu ON lg.lkey = mu.lkey
  JOIN component c ON mu.mukey = c.mukey
  WHERE lg.areasymbol LIKE 'CO%'
)
SELECT mukey, hydgrp, SUM(comppct_r) AS percent
FROM comp
GROUP BY mukey, hydgrp;
```

### AOI MUKEY list → muaggatt
```sql
SELECT mu.mukey, mu.musym, mu.muname, ma.*
FROM mapunit mu
JOIN muaggatt ma ON mu.mukey = ma.mukey
WHERE mu.mukey IN (123456, 234567);
```

---

## 7. SDA SQL Library: GIS + Spatial Intersects

### MUKEY + Component (GIS Join)
```sql
SHAPE {
  SELECT musym, muname, mukey
  FROM legend AS l
  INNER JOIN mapunit AS mu ON l.lkey = mu.lkey
  WHERE areasymbol = 'NE079'
  ORDER BY museq
}
APPEND (
  {
    SELECT mu.mukey, comppct_r, compname
    FROM legend AS l
    INNER JOIN mapunit AS mu ON l.lkey = mu.lkey
    LEFT OUTER JOIN component AS c ON mu.mukey = c.mukey
    WHERE areasymbol = 'NE079'
  } AS component RELATE mukey TO mukey
);
```

### Point Intersect (WGS84)
```sql
SELECT mukey, muname
FROM mapunit
WHERE mukey IN (
  SELECT *
  FROM SDA_Get_Mukey_from_intersection_with_WktWgs84 ('point (-121.77100 37.368402)')
);
```

### Polygon AOI Intersect (STPolyFromText)
```sql
~DeclareGeometry (@aoi)~
SELECT @aoi = geometry::STPolyFromText('polygon ((...))', 4326);
~DeclareIdGeomTable (@intersectedGeo)~
~GetClippedMapunits (@aoi, polygon, geo, @intersectedGeo)~
```

---

## 8. SDA SQL Library: Interpretations

### List interpretations for a survey
```sql
SELECT DISTINCT ci.mrulename, ci.ruledepth
FROM legend AS l
JOIN mapunit AS m ON l.lkey = m.lkey
JOIN component AS c ON m.mukey = c.mukey
JOIN cointerp AS ci ON c.cokey = ci.cokey
WHERE l.areasymbol LIKE 'MI003'
ORDER BY ci.mrulename;
```

### Interpretation restrictions (dominant component)
```sql
SELECT areasymbol, musym, mapunit.mukey, muname,
       compname, comppct_r, majcompflag,
       cointerp.mrulename, interphr, interphrc
FROM legend
JOIN mapunit ON legend.lkey = mapunit.lkey
JOIN component ON mapunit.mukey = component.mukey
JOIN cointerp ON component.cokey = cointerp.cokey
WHERE legend.areasymbol = 'KS169'
  AND majcompflag = 'Yes'
  AND ruledepth = 0;
```

---

## 9. SDA SQL Library: Query Parts (Window Functions)

```sql
-- Dominant component class via windowed SUM
SELECT TOP 1 interphrc
FROM mapunit AS m2
JOIN component AS c2 ON c2.mukey = m2.mukey
JOIN cointerp AS ci2 ON c2.cokey = ci2.cokey
WHERE m2.mukey = mu.mukey AND ruledepth = 0
GROUP BY interphrc, comppct_r
ORDER BY SUM(comppct_r) OVER (PARTITION BY interphrc) DESC;
```

---

## 10. SOC Weighted‑Mean (mapunit‑level)

See full examples in GitHub: https://github.com/ncss-tech/sda-lib

```sql
SELECT areasymbol, mapunit.mukey, mapunit.musym,
       (SELECT TOP 1 taxorder
        FROM component
        WHERE component.mukey = mapunit.mukey
        GROUP BY taxorder, comppct_r
        ORDER BY SUM(comppct_r) OVER (PARTITION BY taxorder) DESC) AS dominant_taxorder
FROM legend
JOIN mapunit ON legend.lkey = mapunit.lkey
WHERE LEFT(areasymbol,2) = 'WI';
```

---

## 11. Training Agenda

1. SDA fundamentals
2. SQL basics
3. SDA HTTP requests
4. Spatial/AOI workflows
5. Interpretations & restrictions
6. SOC & advanced analytics
7. Troubleshooting & best practices

---

## 12. Maintainer
- Jason Nemecek — National Soil Data Applications Scientist
